creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From <https://web.archive.org/web/20221223144631/https://www.freebsd.org/community/>: 

> … Last year there were 14 FreeBSD events in 0 different countries 
> around the world. …

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/?id=e01641c4f3d9d896e76fdad3f94b8681ad157ab0> works around the zero by hiding part of the bugged line, plus minor rewording. 

I assume a regression. 

Low severity; with the workaround, the affected page appears OK.
